title: Group files into folders within the item cards file section
excerpt: It would be amazing to be able to create folders within the files section of the “Items Card”. I know you can use the “Info Boxes”, but this is not as helpful because the files uploaded through a column do not transfer i…

posts.author: annadayton (Anna Dayton)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be amazing to be able to create folders within the files section of the “Items Card”. I know you can use the “Info Boxes”, but this is not as helpful because the files uploaded through a column do not transfer into here, so it would be better if the files section could be grouped.
